title: Capturing a Global State in a Distributed System
description: A visual timeline showing two processes (P1 and P2) and a monitor process capturing a consistent global state using the Chandy-Lamport snapshot algorithm. The diagram illustrates the sending of markers and the recording of local states and in-transit messages.
relationships: Monitor initiates snapshot by sending a marker to P1
P1 records its state and forwards marker to P2
P2 records its state upon receiving marker
Message m is recorded as in-transit as it was sent before P2 received the marker
